REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (231 Bright Street, San Francisco, California)
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mazen Salfiti for Elizabeth Swan.

The sale was confirmed at $448,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $448,000.00 is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (231 Bright Street, San Francisco, California)
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Continued To Jun-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Grech for Elizabeth Menzel.

The Court stated that the second amended petition for sale of the property has a different from the first petitions, that it has a different sale price from the first petition, that notice is untimely and that re-appraisal is needed. Ms. Grech stated that notice was mailed to the new Buyer on May 13, 2011. The Petition to Confirm Saoe of Real Property was continued to June 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (231 Bright Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (231 Bright Street, San Francisco, California)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Continued To May-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Grech for and Elizabeth Swan.

The Buyer was not present. The Court rasied the issue of notice. Mr. Grech acknowledged the defective publication, requested a 6-week continuance and stated that he will address all of the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The matter was continued to May 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Counsel that the commissions will be approved at 5%.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-10-293849 the Estate of Howard S. Livingston Sr.

Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for and with Rita Livingston. Gregory Menzel for and with Elizabeth Swan. Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. Patricia Griffith, Mary Adams and Richard Livingston, Sr. (other interested Parties) also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court appointed Elizabeth Swan as Administrator with limited authority and set bond at $10,000.00. The Court ordered that the two cases be consolidated. No further documents are to be filed in case number 293849.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-29-2010 Continued To Oct-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
